heading: Where I've been on the crew.

items.desc: Crewing live broadcasts as in-game observer, league operator and encoder operator, plus remote vMix consulting for international clients through Upwork.
Supporting live tournament productions across replay, technical support, CG/graphics and audio — including Valorant Pacific and international Masters events.
Ran broadcast operations for talk shows, esports events and live e-commerce streams on TikTok, Shopee and Tokopedia.
Vocational diploma in computer & network engineering — where I built the signal-flow and systems thinking I bring to every production.
